title: Mining Helmets!
description: Adds mining helmets that emit light into the game.
body:
This pack adds mining helmets from terraria into your game.

When wearing a mining helmet, the surrounding area lights up and this light follows you 
wherever you go.

**No mining helmet:**
![No mining helmet](https://i.imgur.com/aavra2e.png)

**With mining helmet:**
![with mining helmet](https://i.imgur.com/qrJ0ks8.png)

The recipe below is to craft the helmet:

![recipe](https://i.imgur.com/I3MVKaI.png)

[This datapack does **NOT** require optifine]
